productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Real Madrid White Jersey
description: CompositionWhite and true blue Real Madrid jersey with ClimaCool ventilation, embossed front highlighting a 3D crest, extra blue detailing on the hems of the short sleeves, adidas applied 3-Stripes on the sleeves, embroidered 'LFP' on an appliquéd patch on the right sleeve and 'REAL MADRID' in rubber print below the neck on the backFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washDo not iron on printDry inside-out in shadeThey call them Los Merengues for a reason. An authentic replica of their all-white home kit, the adidas Real Madrid Home Jersey features Climacool ventilation, a comfy regular Fit, and an embossed front highlighting the new 3D crest that represents the glory of the most successful club. With this Climacool enabled jersey, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of performance fabrics, open mesh and ventilation channels to keep cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
